reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.

reviews.title: Pretty good from someone that is a bit of a skeptic on the benefits of sonic toothbrushes
reviews.text:
Review for: Sparx - Electric Toothbrush, Ultrasonic Toothbrush, Cordless Toothbrush Rechargeable with Light Therapy Technology,

Having tried a couple of different sonic toothbrushes, I have not been impressed with them when compared to a true electric toothbrush. This one though, is much closer to making me a convert. It has much more vibration than others that I have tried and it does feel like it is doing more to clean my teeth. I am not sure if the blue light is really making my teeth whiter but if it is, that is a huge plus.

The brush comes with an extra head, a charger and a set of instructions.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: I’ve been using this all week and really like it. I haven’t had to recharge it. It says it stays charged for 15 hours. I love the 3 different settings (clean, whiten, polish)! My teeth feel cleaner and smoother. It’s a great product!! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: my teeth feels very clean after 1 week of use
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:d99e4c11dd05411b9b597ceb102b22f]] Update: For some reason mine stopped turning on even after I fully charged it. However, customer service was excellent! I reached out to them on Amazon and they immediately sent me a replacement which arrived in 2 days. I am very happy with their level of customer service, in addition to this still being one of the best electronic toothbrush I've used. It really just makes my mouth feel so clean, more than the Philips one ever did. The replacement set that I received has one toothbrush head that emits blue light, and one that emits red light. In my previous set there were only blue light heads so I'm happy I finally get to try the red light. I am currently using this with a whitening gel paste from another brand and it works wonderfully. I am waiting for Sparx to come out with toothpaste (fluoride free please!) and whitening paste. Bottom line: great customer service, great product, and still highly recommend Sparx!

I really like this toothbrush and it really makes me want to brush my teeth more frequently. I have to admit I sometimes get lazy to brush my teeth but this one makes me look forward to my night time routine. I already have an electric toothbrush at home but this one caught my eye because of the LED blue light. I just had to get it because I was curious about this feature.

In terms of the brush power, I think it is great. There are different modes - clean, white, polish, and gum care. Each one vibrates in a different manner. I like that the button is big because if I want to change modes mid brush, my thumb can find it easily. I've used other electric toothbrushes where the power button is so small I couldn't really find it with my thumb. The overall design and size of the button, toothbrush head, and body is perfect, at least for me.

This does use a proprietary brush head, which currently comes in a 1 or 2 pack. It is cheaper to get the 2 pack. I am currently using the blue light version. I believe if you want the red light you'll have to purchase a different brush head. The set I got is both blue light brush heads, so there were two replaceable brush heads in the box. I believe some of their other sets comes with one blue and one red. There is a small charging stand which will need to be plugged into an outlet for the toothbrush to charge.

My only confusion with this product is how the blue light works. Will it work with my own toothpaste or does it require Sparx branded toothpaste? Does the light works to whiten teeth regardless if you use toothpaste or not? Is the LED blue light safe to use on skin? That is the only part that I needed more clarification on, and wished there was more information on this Amazon page.

Regardless of my questions, I still think this is a great electric toothbrush with a lot of potential. My teeth feels so clean after use.

reviews.title: Good Sonic Toothbrush, Confusing Instructions on Whitening
reviews.text: This is an expensive sonic toothbrush that has a blue light feature.  As a sonic toothbrush it works well but there are other options out there that are less expensive that don't require specialized replacement heads.  It is nice that this charges using an USB interface so that saves on cords when traveling.  It is generally not clear how the blue light is supposed to help.  Looking up teeth whitening technology it appears you need a special gel for the blue light to activate teeth whitening.  This is not included with the toothbrush nor discussed in the literature that I can find.  Overall, this works well as a sonic toothbrush, but you will need to purchase special teeth whitening gel to gain the benefits of the blue light as I don't really see a difference by itself.

Plus, the ultra slim, lightweight handle design provides sonic vibrations of 20,000 strokes per minute. †does not replace flossing

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.

Tapered bristles

reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

- Removable insert allows for easy cleaning

Good protection for electric toothbrush, Considering the safety of your electric toothbrush, we choose the better material to keep your triple bristle electric sonic toothbrush safe and secure wherever you go.
Meet your needs
In this case, you can carry:

- ONE toothbrush

- TWO toothbrush heads

- ONE Tongue Cleaner

- Right size and Right weight allows for easy and convenient portability on the go.

features: ✅ PREMIUM HARD CASE MATERIAL - Made to fit ONLY the Triple Bristle sonic toothbrushes. Compatible with the rechargeable and battery-operated toothbrushes. Our travel case is made with premium materials in a matte texture. Very lightweight which is easy to carry with you anywhere you go. Your brush fits securely inside with or without brush head cover on.
✅ KEEP YOUR BRUSH CLEAN AND DRY - Semi-waterproof with a reinforced zipper closure. Each toothbrush travel case can hold one toothbrush, extra brush head and tongue cleaner.

✅ PROPERLY DESIGNED PORTABLE & DURABLE - Toothbrush case is convenient to carry, perfect for travel. Take your brush to work, to the gym, in your purse or even in your glove box in the car. Put the toothbrush case in your suitcase or bag. Great for business trips, traveling, school, camping and away from your home.

✅ COMPACT & HYGENIC - Easy to clean and maintain, keeps your toothbrushes clean and dry in a healthy environment. High-quality plastic case, sturdy, slim, and easy to carry. Dust-proof and moisture-proof protects the toothbrush. Save space in your purse, carry-on, or travel toiletry bag. Rounded corner design will not scratch other items in your bag.

✅ SLEEK TOOTHBRUSH CASE – This 10” x 1.5” x 2.5” case comes in two vibrant colors – blue and pink. The case and zipper are embossed with the Triple Bristle tooth to sport the Triple Bristle lifestyle in a sleek and elegant way.
✅ TRIPLE BRISTLE FAMILY OF PRODUCTS - Check out our line of sonic toothbrushes with our patented 3 head brush design for a faster more reliable clean!

✅ A CASE WITH A PURPOSE - It's a toothbrush case with a purpose: to protect your toothbrush from the elements, while letting you take it everywhere you go without worrying about what might happen to it.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush covers!
reviews.text:
Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well
reviews.text: Just what they say they are. They fit our electric toothbrush heads perfectly. Easy to open and close.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

【EASY TO USE】Squeeze toothpaste on the both side of the baby's toothbrush and put the kids toothbrush into baby's mouth, Swing it left to right, in 60 seconds finished the brushing. This package comes with 1 silicone toothbrush and 1 replacement silicone brush head, it is recommended to replace the brush head every 1 month. Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

title: Bamboo Aesthetic Toothbrush Wood Set of 10 | Ultra Soft Bristles | Black Charcoal Infused | American Brand | Upgrade Hygiene & Reduce Waste | Brushes Teeth Care | Earth Friendly | Plant Based
features: GO GREEN – Show your commitment to the environment by switching to a bamboo toothbrush. Our sustainable toothbrushes use fewer resources and will help you reduce your plastic consumption.
GREAT FOR FAMILIES – Get a 12-month supply for every member of your household. Save time and money with a pack of 10 toothbrushes instead of purchasing each individually.

SMOOTH & BAMBOO MADE HANDLE – Our toothbrush handles are made from water-resistant bamboo, which is stronger and harder than wood. Unlike plastic, they can be used without having to be dried after rinsing.

AN AMERICAN COMPANY – Our family owned brand is based in Florida and currently produces most of our products abroad. However, once consumer demand increases, we'll bring it back to the U.S. Spread the word and let's go green together!

SATISFACTION GUARANTEED – We want you to love our quality bamboo toothbrushes as much as we do. If for any reason you don't, simply return it for a full refund of the purchase price - it's the best and we guarantee it!

reviews.title: Bamboo Toothbrush I Soft Bristles Best for Sensitive Gums
reviews.text: I had bought a different toothbrush a couple of yrs. ago with the charcoal activated bristles, that I really like. I expected these to be similar, but I now wish I had not bought these. The bristles were not as soft as I'm used to & the design of this toothbrush could be improved upon. First of all, the wood handles are rough (kind of like sanded wood that hasn't been properly sealed & finished). They were not comfortable to hold or use for brushing teeth. However, they'd be great for cleaning or to use in art or craft projects (which is what I intend to use them for) so they won't go to waste! But I won't be buying them as a toothbrush again.

title: SHNOKER Toothbrush,Ultrasonic Automatic Toothbrush,IPX7 Waterproof,Three Clearing Modes,Cartoon Modeling Design for Kids (Blue 3-6 Year)
features: 【LOVELY CARTOON DESIGN TO ENHANCE THE FUN OF BRUSHING TEETH】 The cute cartoon design make this lovely automatic toothbrush attractive to all kids, they are excited to brush the teeth with this funny toothbrush, easy and fun for little brusher ages 3 and up. This help your kids be willing to brush teeth longer even develop healthy brushing habits.

【IPX7 WATERPROOF】IPX7 waterproof sealing design is adopted, and babies can also use it when bathing. The product can be placed in a water depth of 1 meter and soaked for 15 minutes, and the product is still in normal use without being damaged.

【FAST CHARGING】 The ultrasonic toothbrush is equipped with fast charging cable, which can be discharged and charged instantly. The LED lights on when USB charging is connected, and it only needs to be charged for 3 hours and can be used for 1 week. Safe, fast and convenient, easy to use at home or travel.

【UNIQUE U-SHAPED DESIGN】 Ergonomic U-shaped brush head, suitable for the shape and mechanics of children's teeth structure. Soft pacifier grade silicone, soft brim around the teeth 360 degrees, providing a comfortable feeling of brushing, the original V-shaped cleaning path, effective deep cleaning, will not harm the gums, protect children's enamel.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODE】Our automatic toothbrush can promote the health of gums and teeth through different functional modes : 1. Strong mode for powerful teeth brushing; 2. Medium mode for comfortable teeth brushing; 3. Massage mode for gum massage.50 secs scientific timing for each brushing, it stops automatically, Parents don’t have to face to face to urge children to brush their teeth.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth

Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these

reviews.title: Gross!

The toothpaste foams good and seems ok but after my toddler spit it out upon first entering her mouth and making the “lemon face” I tried it too.
The watermelon is SO gross. The strawberry is a tiny bit better. I could manage to make myself use the strawberry but toddlers are not going to make themselves brush their teeth with nasty flavored stuff.
